implementationGroups.title: Source behavior: presentation/home
requiredBehaviors: `HomeScreen.kt` composes bundled ad, category, favourite, and restaurant-card imagery into the discovery feed without any gallery picker, EXIF processing, or zoom interaction.
`HomeScreen.kt` routes restaurant-card and favourite-strip selections into the detail screen by writing the selected restaurant and then navigating.
`HomeScreen.kt` composes the top profile affordance, content sections, and bottom-shell relationship used by the shared navigation surface.
`HomeScreen.kt` observes `HomeViewModel` state so ads, categories, favourites, and restaurants recompose immediately as backing data changes.
`HomeScreen.kt` reads view-model state on entry and updates system bars while composing the feed.
`HomeViewModel.kt` aggregates repository-backed ads, food items, restaurants, and liked restaurants into observable screen state.
`HomeViewModel.kt` aggregates repository state and does not request runtime permissions.
`HomeViewModel.kt` loads repository-backed lists during initialization so the home feed is ready when the screen appears.
`AdCard.kt` renders a bundled ad illustration inside the home carousel card.

matchedGroups.title: Home feed, search, favourites, and selection
requiredBehaviors: Home screen renders all sections from repository-backed state.
Favourite section is conditional on non-empty liked list.
Restaurant selection updates shared selection and navigates to detail.
riskHints: Current target home page is already a concentration risk; keep extracted widgets and helpers.
uiContracts: home section order: top, greeting, search, ads, recommended foods, favourites, chips, restaurant list, thank you

phaseGroupIndex.title: Platform capability: Media library and album discovery

coordinationNotes: Prefer extending existing route/navigation/state surfaces over creating parallel shells.
If a shared surface must change, keep the change minimal and update only evidence rows tied to this group.
Repository/store groups should preserve existing data ownership and avoid duplicating global state.

matrixRows.featureName: Image viewing, bitmap/exif handling, zoom, preview, or gallery display behavior.
matrixRows.featurePoint: Image viewing, bitmap/exif handling, zoom, preview, or gallery display behavior.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `HomeScreen.kt` itself only composes image-backed sections and does not implement gallery, EXIF, or zoom behavior.

Manual target review confirmed `renderHomeRoute` preserves the same packaged-media home sections through `buildHomeAdCards`, `buildRecommendedCategories`, `buildFavouriteStrip`, and `buildRestaurantList`.
Phase-04 Harmony build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-04-home-history/build-report.md`.

Focused target test PASS on 2026-06-28: `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` from `entry/src/test/cangjie` passed `phase04_home_history_discovery_test.cj::homeStoreLoadsFixtureBackedSections`, confirming the home feed still loads the repository-backed sections that own the bundled media surfaces.

{'kind': 'focused-test-pass', 'detail': '`cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` passed `phase04_home_history_discovery_test.cj::homeStoreLoadsFixtureBackedSections`, covering the repository-backed home sections that surface the packaged images.'}

{'kind': 'manual-review', 'detail': 'The translated home route preserves static packaged imagery for ads, categories, favourites, and restaurant cards without widening the phase into media-library or image-viewer behavior.'}
